title: ChEMBL Activity
description: A bioactivity measurement from a ChEMBL assay, linking a compound to a biological target with a quantitative or qualitative measurement.

activity_id.description: Unique numeric ID for the activity record

assay_description.description: Description of the assay as extracted from the source document

assay_type.description: Assay type code: B=Binding, F=Functional, A=ADME, T=Toxicity, P=Physicochemical, U=Unclassified

canonical_smiles.description: Canonical SMILES representation of the tested compound

data_validity_comment.description: Comment on data validity or quality issues

document_chembl_id.description: ChEMBL ID of the source document

molecule_chembl_id.description: ChEMBL ID of the tested compound

pchembl_value.description: Negative log10 of the molar activity value (comparable across activity types)

relation.description: Relationship qualifier for the original reported activity value

standard_flag.description: Whether this activity value was standardized

standard_text_value.description: Standardized text value for non-numeric activities

standard_type.description: Standardized activity type (e.g., IC50, Ki, EC50, Kd, Potency)

standard_units.description: Standardized units of the activity measurement (e.g., nM, uM)

target_chembl_id.description: ChEMBL ID of the biological target

target_pref_name.description: Preferred name of the biological target

target_tax_id.description: NCBI taxonomy ID of the target organism

type.description: Original activity type as reported in the source document

units.description: Original units as reported in the source document

value.description: Original numeric or text value as reported
